channel.title: Dr. Anil H. Gore
channel.description: Associate Professor of Analytical Chemistry | Sustainable Nanotechnology | UKA Tarsadia University

item.title: CSR-Funded Gas Chromatography Project Launched
item.description: New CSR-funded research project worth Rs. 17,04,400/- on Gas Chromatography for emerging environmental pollutant analysis, climate change impact, and social awareness now underway.

item.title: Microplastic Contamination in Indian Rice: A Landmark Study
item.description: Our latest research published in Journal of Hazardous Materials reveals alarming levels of microplastic contamination in commercially available Indian rice, with comprehensive health risk assessment.

item.title: Invited Talk at Khalifa University, Abu Dhabi on Micro & Nano Plastics
item.description: Dr. Anil H. Gore delivered an invited guest lecture at Khalifa University of Science and Technology, Abu Dhabi, UAE on the global threats of micro and nanoplastics.

item.title: Nanocarbon Eco-Hydrogel Kit Published in Analyst
item.description: Our innovative nanocarbon eco-hydrogel kit for on-site visual metal ion sensing and dye cleanup has been published in the RSC Analyst journal, advancing circular economy principles.

item.title: Congratulations Dr. Pooja V. Deore — PhD Awarded!
item.description: We are delighted to announce that Miss Pooja V. Deore has been awarded her PhD degree for her thesis on Designing of Hybrid Hydrogel for Removal of Emerging Contaminants.
